title: Block Pack
description: 📦 Add 1200+ decorative furniture blocks & functional furniture vanilla style blocks in Minecraft
body: **Block Pack adds 1200+ building blocks. Build literally anything.** ## 📋 About Block Pack adds over **1200 building and decoration blocks** to Minecraft - one mod, every style. Build in medieval, Japanese, Greek, cyberpunk, modern, or underwater themes from a single pack. Made for vanilla builders who want more shapes, more detail, and full customization without losing the base-game feel. ## 🧱 More Than Decoration Block Pack blocks actually *do* things: - **Fillable storage** - crates, fish barrels, baskets and sacks: right-click to stash items and pull them back out - **Lights everywhere** - paper lanterns and hanging lamps that sway on their chains, neon signs, string lights, candlesticks in every color, and glowing hologram blocks - **Living streets** - air conditioners, smoking chimneys, weather vanes, vents and gutters that bring a town to life - **The Wrench** - change block states and swap variants right in the world, no menus - **A custom Wandering Trader** - roaming your world with exclusive Block Pack goods ## 🔨 The Workbench Every block is crafted at the **Workbench**, a dedicated station with its own recipe book - so 1200 fresh recipes never clutter your vanilla crafting table. ## 🔧 Compatibility Full support for **JEI**, **EMI**, **Jade**, and **Chipped**. ## 🚀 Supported Versions - **1.21.1** - NeoForge · Fabric - **1.20.1** - Forge · Fabric *Fabric requires the Fabric API.*
